_comment: Item definitions. Key = item_id used everywhere else. Add as many fields as you need.

map_fragment.name: Map Fragment
map_fragment.description: Reveals nearby zones on the overworld map.

food_can.name: Food Can
food_can.description: Restores 15 hunger. Store in inventory to eat later.

energy_bar.name: Energy Bar
energy_bar.description: Quick burst of calories. Restores 10 hunger instantly.

rad_suit.name: Radiation Suit
rad_suit.description: Worn suit that reduces all radiation by 60% while equipped.

rabbit_meat.name: Rabbit Meat
rabbit_meat.description: Lean meat from a rabbit. Restores 12 hunger.

deer_meat.name: Deer Meat
deer_meat.description: Meat from a deer. Restores 20 hunger.

moose_meat.name: Moose Meat
moose_meat.description: Hearty meat from a moose. Restores 30 hunger.
